title: Decision Memo Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter for a decision memo. Validates that the memo is decision-grade — has a decider, a due date, a question, and a status.

title.description: The question being decided, ideally phrased as a question and ≤ one sentence

decider.description: Email or named human who will sign. Not a team.

co_deciders.description: Other named humans who must concur. Use sparingly; one decider is the norm.

due.description: ISO date by which the decision is needed

decided.description: ISO date when the decision was made; null until decided

decision.description: Which option was chosen, e.g., 'Option B'. Null until decided.

reversibility.description: Bezos framing — one-way doors require more deliberation

links.description: Named links: prior_memo, related_raid, source_doc, etc.
